meaning: n.鍩冮噷浜氫汉,鍩冮噷浜氭淳涔嬩俊寰抋dj.鍩冮噷浜氱殑
examples: Greek philosopher, member of the Eleatic sch001.
This portion of Raphael's the School of Athens shows one of the two Zenos, but not necessarily the Eleatic.
An ancient Greek colony of southern Italy near the Gulf of Salerno. Reputedly founded by Xenophanes, it was the center of the Eleatic school of philosophy.
